segments.text: AI is rewriting the rules of software
development. Code is being generated
faster than ever, and the amount written
by AI keeps [music] growing. But here's
the catch. AI struggles with the complex
code bases enterprises rely on. Calling
the wrong libraries, slipping in hidden
logic errors, breaking critical build
constraints. The result, your
application's quality and security are
at risk. And when things go wrong, you
[music] are accountable. Unverified AI
code isn't just risky, it's a ticking
time bomb on your reputation. That's
where Sonar comes in. The gold standard
[music] for automated code review.
Trusted for over 16 years by 7 million
developers at 400,000 organizations
worldwide. Today, Sonar helps ensure all
developer written and AI generated code
[music] is secure, reliable, and
maintainable. We integrate seamlessly
with AI coding tools, catching issues
early, delivering automated fixes,
saving you time and headaches. That's
why G2 [music] has ranked Sonar number
one for 5 years running. So go ahead,
[music] use AI to accelerate and trust
Sonar to verify your codebase is healthy
and secure.

fullText: AI is rewriting the rules of software development. Code is being generated faster than ever, and the amount written by AI keeps [music] growing. But here's the catch. AI struggles with the complex code bases enterprises rely on. Calling the wrong libraries, slipping in hidden logic errors, breaking critical build constraints. The result, your application's quality and security are at risk. And when things go wrong, you [music] are accountable. Unverified AI code isn't just risky, it's a ticking time bomb on your reputation. That's where Sonar comes in. The gold standard [music] for automated code review. Trusted for over 16 years by 7 million developers at 400,000 organizations worldwide. Today, Sonar helps ensure all developer written and AI generated code [music] is secure, reliable, and maintainable. We integrate seamlessly with AI coding tools, catching issues early, delivering automated fixes, saving you time and headaches. That's why G2 [music] has ranked Sonar number one for 5 years running. So go ahead, [music] use AI to accelerate and trust Sonar to verify your codebase is healthy and secure.
